creator: matusita@ics.es.osaka-u.ac.jp
text:
asami> The port is way too complex.

Hmm, I think so too... speaking English is also too complex :-)

asami> Please don't go out of your way just to change the name.  You
asami> have added a new cookie, extra PLISTs and a whole lot of lines
asami> in the Makefile.  Just call it fvwm2 (or fvwm if you want --
asami> does it really matter?)....

O.K., I'll rework ASAP.

asami> Also, please don't replicate the contents of all those targets from
asami> bsd.port.mk.  If the only problem is that the distribution patch comes 
asami> inside a tarball and not a regular patch, you can just add it to
asami> DISTFILES and create a pre-patch target to explicitly patch that file
asami> only.

Well, that's simple, but how do I specify the master site for the
patch ? Only just add MASTER_SITES is maybe bad idea, because the
directory of fvwm itself and patch itself is NOT the same... What
should I do ?

-- -
Makoto `MAR_kun' MATSUSHITA
